# EduAI - Next.js 14 Project

A modern educational platform built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

## Project Setup Complete

- ✅ Next.js 14 with App Router
- ✅ TypeScript configuration
- ✅ Tailwind CSS setup
- ✅ ESLint enabled
- ✅ Clean folder structure
- ✅ Reusable components
- ✅ API routes ready

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

Visit [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000)

## Available Commands

- `npm run dev` - Development server
- `npm run build` - Production build
- `npm start` - Start production server
- `npm run lint` - Run linter

## Project Structure

- **app/** - App Router pages and layouts
- **components/** - Reusable React components
- **app/api/** - API route handlers
- **app/dashboard/** - Dashboard page

## Key Features

- Modern responsive design
- TypeScript support
- Component-based architecture
- Tailwind CSS styling
- ESLint configuration
- Production-ready setup

## Next Steps

1. Customize the theme in `tailwind.config.ts`
2. Add more pages in the `app/` directory
3. Create API endpoints in `app/api/`
4. Build components in the `components/` folder
